name: Bagel Toppers 3
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Smoked salmon, cut into slivers
4 oz Whipped cream cheese with chives
5 Whole wheat or white bagels, halved
Green bell pepper, mushroom, or black olives (chopped)
recipeInstructions:
This is for 4 bagels, halved and toasted.
NEW YORKER: Combine cream cheese, salmon, sour cream, lemon juice, dill, salt, and pepper.
MIDWESTERN: Combine cream cheese with chives, ham, honey mustard, and pepper.
CALIFORNIAN: Combine ricotta, radishes, cucumbers, parsley, salt, and grated lemon peel.
PIZZA SNACK: Preheat oven to 450°F. In a small bowl, combine tomato paste and oregano. Spread each bagel half with the paste mixture. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet. Top each with chopped bell pepper and sprinkle with cheese. Bake at 450°F for 6 to 8 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
